raw_summary: Toronto office — internet access intermittent. Going down for a few minutes then coming back. No pattern to it. Has been happening for 2 hours.
normalized_summary: toronto office — internet access intermittent. going down for a few minutes then coming back. no pattern to it. has been happening for 2 hours.
final_root_cause: Carrier performing emergency maintenance on local loop without notification. Failover not triggering consistently.
final_resolution: Identified via carrier portal. Failover manually triggered. Carrier completed maintenance after 90 minutes.

raw_summary: Sydney-CBD floor 9 — network completely saturated. Broadcast traffic consuming all bandwidth. Users unable to do anything.
normalized_summary: sydney-cbd floor 9 — network completely saturated. broadcast traffic consuming all bandwidth. users unable to do anything.
final_root_cause: Broadcast storm from Layer 2 loop. Unmanaged switch connected by user created loop. No BPDU guard on port.
final_resolution: Shut down loop port. Storm dissipated. BPDU guard enabled on all access ports. Policy updated.

raw_summary: Austin-HQ floor 7 — complete network outage on the floor. Severe broadcast storm observed. Switch CPU at 100%. Wired and wireless both down.
normalized_summary: austin-hq floor 7 — complete network outage on the floor. severe broadcast storm observed. switch cpu at 100%. wired and wireless both down.
final_root_cause: User plugged in personal switch with STP disabled, creating a loop. Portfast on user port without BPDU guard allowed loop to propagate.
final_resolution: Identified and disabled loop port. Enabled BPDU guard on all user-facing ports. Loop dissipated. Added BPDU guard to standard config.

raw_summary: Dublin-Docklands — switch logging thousands of input errors per minute on WAN interface. Performance significantly degraded.
normalized_summary: dublin-docklands — switch logging thousands of input errors per minute on wan interface. performance significantly degraded.
final_root_cause: Duplex mismatch between customer router and carrier hand-off device. Half-duplex on carrier side.
final_resolution: Corrected duplex to full on both sides. CRC errors stopped immediately.

raw_summary: Chicago-Fulton — specific user group (security team) unable to reach restricted network segment. All other users fine. Started after yesterday's ISE update.
normalized_summary: chicago-fulton — specific user group (security team) unable to reach restricted network segment. all other users fine. started after yesterday's ise update.
final_root_cause: ISE authorization policy for security team AD group overwritten during policy update. Group mapped to wrong dACL.
final_resolution: Corrected dACL mapping in ISE. Security team access restored. Change process for ISE policy updates reviewed.

raw_summary: Three offices in Austin and Seattle reporting complete inability to reach internal tools including Chime, Quip, and the internal wiki. Issue started 25 minutes ago. Wireless appears to be connecting fine. Wired users also affected.
normalized_summary: three offices in austin and seattle reporting complete inability to reach internal tools including chime, quip, and the internal wiki. issue started 25 minutes ago. wireless appears to be connecting fine. wired users also affected.
final_root_cause: BGP session between Austin edge router and upstream provider dropped due to hold-timer expiry. Missing keepalive tuning.
final_resolution: Reset BGP session on edge router. Applied hold-timer fix. Session stable. Escalated to provider for long-term fix.

raw_summary: Seattle-Beacon — new laptops from this week's hardware refresh cannot connect to wired network. Previous laptops from same model work fine. Wireless works for affected users.
normalized_summary: seattle-beacon — new laptops from this week's hardware refresh cannot connect to wired network. previous laptops from same model work fine. wireless works for affected users.
final_root_cause: New laptop model shipped with 802.1X supplicant disabled by default. Previous model had it enabled in corporate image.
final_resolution: Pushed supplicant config via MDM to affected devices. Updated device deployment checklist.

raw_summary: London-Victoria — video conferencing users experiencing choppy calls. File transfers fine. Ping shows highly variable latency, 20ms to 200ms.
normalized_summary: london-victoria — video conferencing users experiencing choppy calls. file transfers fine. ping shows highly variable latency, 20ms to 200ms.
final_root_cause: Carrier backbone congestion causing jitter on WAN circuit. Burst traffic from other customers on shared segment.
final_resolution: Carrier identified congestion node. Traffic re-routed. QoS policy tuned for video traffic as interim fix.

raw_summary: Chicago Loop office — all users unable to reach anything outside the building. Internal file shares still work. Started 10 mins ago.
normalized_summary: chicago loop office — all users unable to reach anything outside the building. internal file shares still work. started 10 mins ago.
final_root_cause: Upstream ISP fiber cut. Internal LAN unaffected.
final_resolution: Activated 4G failover link. Opened carrier P1. Primary restored after 3 hours.

raw_summary: London-Shoreditch cafeteria area — wireless speeds extremely slow. Other areas of the office are fine. Issue has been getting worse over the past week.
normalized_summary: london-shoreditch cafeteria area — wireless speeds extremely slow. other areas of the office are fine. issue has been getting worse over the past week.
final_root_cause: New tenant in adjacent building installed high-power WiFi on overlapping channels. Co-channel interference degrading SNR in cafeteria.
final_resolution: Changed cafeteria APs to 5GHz-only. Reduced channel width. Signal levels and speeds returned to normal.

raw_summary: Austin-HQ floors 3 and 4 — all wireless users dropped simultaneously 15 minutes ago. Wired users are completely unaffected. About 80 users impacted.
normalized_summary: austin-hq floors 3 and 4 — all wireless users dropped simultaneously 15 minutes ago. wired users are completely unaffected. about 80 users impacted.
final_root_cause: Wireless controller process crashed after memory exhaustion. All APs managed by that controller lost connectivity.
final_resolution: Restarted wireless controller process. APs re-associated within 4 minutes. Added memory monitoring alert.

raw_summary: London-Shoreditch — inter-floor connectivity broken. Users on floors 1-3 cannot reach floors 4-6. Internet still works. Escalating.
normalized_summary: london-shoreditch — inter-floor connectivity broken. users on floors 1-3 cannot reach floors 4-6. internet still works. escalating.
final_root_cause: OSPF adjacency between distribution switches dropped after MTU mismatch introduced during IOS upgrade.
final_resolution: Fixed MTU on distribution switch interfaces. OSPF adjacency restored. Inter-floor routing recovered.

raw_summary: Singapore-Marina — monitoring system has been blind to one distribution switch for 3 weeks. No alerts from that switch. Switch is actually up and passing traffic.
normalized_summary: singapore-marina — monitoring system has been blind to one distribution switch for 3 weeks. no alerts from that switch. switch is actually up and passing traffic.
final_root_cause: SNMP community string changed on switch during security audit. Monitoring system not updated.
final_resolution: Updated SNMP community in monitoring system. Full visibility restored. Process updated to include monitoring update step.

raw_summary: Amsterdam-Zuidas — video calls degraded, some file transfers failing. Issue intermittent. Seems worse in afternoons.
normalized_summary: amsterdam-zuidas — video calls degraded, some file transfers failing. issue intermittent. seems worse in afternoons.
final_root_cause: Carrier circuit experiencing burst packet loss during peak hours. Carrier-side buffer issue.
final_resolution: Carrier identified oversubscribed backhaul segment. Migrated circuit to alternate path.

raw_summary: Entire Seattle-Beacon office — corporate SSID has disappeared. Guest SSID is still visible. Started this morning.
normalized_summary: entire seattle-beacon office — corporate ssid has disappeared. guest ssid is still visible. started this morning.
final_root_cause: SSID profile accidentally deleted during controller upgrade last night. Guest SSID on separate profile was unaffected.
final_resolution: Restored SSID profile from backup config. Applied to all APs. Change process updated to include SSID validation.

raw_summary: Cannot connect. Please help urgently.
normalized_summary: cannot connect. please help urgently.
final_root_cause: Unknown — no useful information in escalation.
final_resolution: Returned to OMC. Required fields: site, floor, number of users, wired or wireless, applications affected.

raw_summary: Escalating from Tier 1. User says network is broken. Tier 1 could not get more information from user before they left for a meeting.
normalized_summary: escalating from tier 1. user says network is broken. tier 1 could not get more information from user before they left for a meeting.
final_root_cause: Unknown — incomplete escalation from Tier 1.
final_resolution: Marked as pending. Awaiting callback from user. OMC training updated on information gathering.

raw_summary: Austin-Domain — specific server unreachable from all clients. Server is up and responding locally. Network team can ping from core switch but not from access layer.
normalized_summary: austin-domain — specific server unreachable from all clients. server is up and responding locally. network team can ping from core switch but not from access layer.
final_root_cause: Stale ARP entry on distribution switch pointing to old server MAC. Clear ARP resolved. Underlying cause: server NIC replaced without MAC update in CMDB.
final_resolution: Cleared ARP cache on distribution switch. Updated CMDB with new MAC. Server accessible.

raw_summary: Austin-HQ — interface errors steadily increasing on WAN uplink. Packet loss around 2-3%. Performance degraded but not down.
normalized_summary: austin-hq — interface errors steadily increasing on wan uplink. packet loss around 2-3%. performance degraded but not down.
final_root_cause: Physical layer degradation on fiber run. CRC errors indicating noise on the line.
final_resolution: Raised carrier P2 ticket. Carrier dispatched to clean fiber connector. Errors cleared.

raw_summary: London-Victoria — after weekend switch firmware upgrade, specific multicast applications stopped working. Unicast traffic fine.
normalized_summary: london-victoria — after weekend switch firmware upgrade, specific multicast applications stopped working. unicast traffic fine.
final_root_cause: Firmware version 17.3.4 has known bug affecting PIM sparse mode. Multicast routing broken.
final_resolution: Rolled back firmware to 17.3.3. Multicast restored. Vendor engaged on bug fix.
